data.title: Mindbreeze named a Leader in Cognitive Search Platforms 2025 by Forrester Wave™ evaluation. #Mindbreeze #Forrester #Leader
data.description: In Chicago, Mindbreeze has been identified as a top performer in The Forrester Wave™: Cognitive Search Platforms, Q4 2025, solidifying its position as a Leader in the field. The acknowledgment highlights Mindbreeze's exceptional capabilities and places them among the elite companies in the sector.

data.title: Israeli tech sector experiences $71B in M&As in 2025 despite fewer funding rounds. Cybersecurity leads.
data.description: Investor interest is gravitating towards bigger, more discerning investments as the market dynamics evolve. There is a consistent and stable global interest from investors. Cybersecurity remains a key player in the mergers and acquisitions landscape, with a significant amount of capital being attracted towards this sector. The city of Tel Aviv, Israel, saw these trends illustrated on October 3, 2025, when Startup Nation Central, a nonprofit organization dedicated to fostering Israeli innovation, highlighted these developments.

data.title: Mesa Labs (NASDAQ: MLAB) declares $0.16 quarterly dividend, payable on Dec 15, 2025 to shareholders of record on Nov 28, 2025.
data.description: In Lakewood, Colorado on October 3, 2025, Mesa Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: MLAB) revealed a set quarterly dividend of $0.16 per common stock share. The scheduled payment date for the dividend is December 15, 2025, and it will be distributed to shareholders recorded as of November 28, 2025.

data.title: Revelyst unveils Revelyst Gives Foundation on Revelyst Day, marking anniversary, supporting grant recipients.
data.description: In Providence, Rhode Island, Revelyst has announced the launch of Revelyst Gives, which aligns with Revelyst Day on the first Friday of October, marking the company's founding anniversary.

data.title: Bleuet sells 500,000 bras, celebrates milestone.
data.description: A clothing brand, Bleuet, based in Los Angeles, has recently reached a significant achievement by selling 500,000 bras. Bleuet specializes in producing training bras, teen bras, and everyday bras tailored for girls.

data.title: Investor rights law firm investigates PRO, FSFG, TIPT for potential violations affecting shareholders.
data.description: A reputable investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, has commenced investigations into various companies regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties and violations of federal securities laws. One such investigation involves PROS Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRO), which is under scrutiny for its sale transaction. The firm's inquiry seeks to ensure fair treatment and transparency for shareholders. The investigation is part of a larger effort by Halper Sadeh LLC to uphold investor rights and maintain market integrity.

data.title: Brilliant Earth CEO, Beth Gerstein, mourns loss of friend Dr. Jane Goodall in San Francisco, Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 3, 2025, Beth Gerstein, Co-Founder and CEO of Brilliant Earth, expressed her condolences for the loss of her friend and collaborator, Dr. Jane Goodall. She shared a personal message highlighting the impact of Dr. Goodall's passing on her and the ongoing initiatives to uphold her legacy. Gerstein stated, "I am profoundly saddened by the news of the passing of my friend...".

data.title: Otto clinics report a 64% rise in online bookings and 51x better response to text reminders than emails amidst declining visits.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, there has been a 4.6% decrease in small animal veterinary visits compared to the previous year. 41% of pet owners are finding it challenging to afford veterinary care. To combat this trend, clinics are looking for strategies to improve client engagement and appointment bookings. The Otto 2025 Client Engagement Report indicates a significant shift towards digital engagement methods. Clinics utilizing Otto's digital platform have experienced a substantial 64% rise in appointments booked directly through their digital channels. This data highlights the increasing importance of digital connections in the veterinary industry to maintain client relationships and drive appointment bookings.

data.title: Crypto fraudster, with ties to $580M theft, caught in Bangkok. Lived unlawfully in Thailand since 2023, engaging in crimes.
data.description: The individual accused of scamming had been residing unlawfully in Thailand since 2023, all the while engaging in illicit activities.

data.title: Brandywine Realty Trust closes $300M offering of 6.125% notes due 2031. Company's partnership completed the public offering.
data.description: Philadelphia-based Brandywine Realty Trust revealed on October 3, 2025, that its subsidiary, Brandywine Operating Partnership, L.P., successfully completed an underwritten public offering. The offering, totaling $300 million, involved the issuance of 6.125% guaranteed notes set to mature in 2031. This financial move aimed to raise funds for the Company and bolster its operational initiatives.
Virbac discloses its total number of shares and voting rights for September 2025.

data.title: Samsung and Coinbase team up to offer crypto buying on Galaxy Wallet, benefiting 75M US users, with a global launch ahead.
data.description: Samsung Wallet has partnered with Coinbase to offer simpler access to cryptocurrency for over 75 million Galaxy users in the United States. The collaboration also has plans for a worldwide expansion in the future, aiming to bring the initiative to a much larger user base across the globe.

data.title: Goodwill NYNJ introduces PACE program in Queens to aid adults in achieving sustained employment success.
data.description: In Queens, New York, on October 3, 2025, Goodwill Industries of Greater New York and Northern New Jersey (Goodwill NYNJ) revealed their new PACE (Partnership for Advancement and Career Enhancement) program aimed at assisting adults in securing sustainable employment. This program builds upon the organization's successful track record spanning two decades. Goodwill NYNJ's initiative aims to enhance job prospects for individuals within the community by providing tailored support, equipping them with necessary skills and resources. The PACE program's launch signifies a significant step forward in aiding individuals in attaining long-term employment security.

data.title: Strata Skin Sciences' XTRAC® Excimer Laser validated as breakthrough therapy for localized eczema; AMA expands indications for treatment.
data.description: In Horsham, Pennsylvania on October 3, 2025, STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: SSKN) commemorated Eczema Awareness Month by emphasizing the vast peer-reviewed clinical evidence endorsing the XTRAC ® Excimer Laser (308 nm) as a secure and highly efficient therapy for localized atopic dermatitis, the prevalent eczema type. This acknowledgment coincides with the American Medical Association (AMA) broadening excimer laser’s usage to inflammatory and autoimmune skin diseases, facilitating Medicare, Medicaid, and private insurer coverage for treating atopic dermatitis.
